graph order
81
adjacency matrix

label vector
20 76 5 78 12 32 8 54 3 17 79 59 45 15 29 71 47 63 66 53 9 39 33 56 27 48 13 81 16 69 36 75 43 37 25 30 40 24 50 49 22 80 28 65 62 58 6 41 31 38 11 44 46 52 14 72 77 1 51 7 10 19 60 70 64 67 34 35 74 4 55 2 26 18 21 73 42 23 57 61 68
